b:T17b18,<div class="question">
<p>The diagram shows a respirometer.</p>
<p style="text-align: center;"><img src="data:image/png;base64,"/></p>
<p style="text-align: center;">[Source: Courtesy The Royal Society of Biology.]</p>
<p style="text-align: left;"> </p>
<p style="text-align: left;">What solution should be in the bottom of each tube and in which direction will the manometer fluid move?</p>
<p style="text-align: left;"><img src="data:image/png;base64,"/></p>
